messages.message: I propose coordination on the Western Front. I will support your advance into Burgundy if you assist me in securing Tuscany. Let me know your plans.
Hi Italy! The standard IA is always in the way, so I'm happy to go another route if you're interested.
I suggest we remain neutral toward each other for now. I have no interest in conflict unless provoked.
Hi Germany! I see no reason for us to get in the way. Are you open to working with me, or just leaving each other alone?

Hey Russia!
I think our two nations make very natural allies. If we work together, we can make short work of Austria and split up the centers quite nicely. What do you say?
Absolutely! Austria and Germany always have so many potential enemies that we need to work together as closely as possible.

Hello Austria!
I think our two nations make very natural allies, and we can make short work of Russia. What do you say?
Hey France! I think we both benefit a lot from working together. Do you have any interest in establishing a DMZ in the channel and work together?

Hello there, England.

Though there isn't much we can do to help each other right now, I'd be more than happy to share any information I might pick up. Would you agree?

Hello there, Germany.

Though there isn't much we can do to help each other right now, I'd be more than happy to share any information I might pick up. Would you agree?

Hello there, France.

Though there isn't much we can do to help each other right now, I'd be more than happy to share any information I might pick up. Would you agree?
I intend to expand into the Mediterranean. I expect your fleet will not stand in my way.
I would love that! How would you propose we go about that?

Hello England! I hope we can work together closely. I'd like to work with you to take out France as soon as possible. If you're willing to commit to an early attack on France I think we can get a quick takedown and grow from that.

Hi Turkey!

I absolutely would agree. If I hear anything concerning your neighbors I will definitely share it. In return, I would ask that you do the same for me!

Cheers!

Perfect. I'll stay away from you and you stay away from me, and if we can share info that could be mutually beneficial, that would be excellent.

For my part, I haven't heard from anyone but you yet, so I can't share any intel.
You mean Tunis, right? :)

Hello France!

I'm looking for a partner who wants to go forward with this game. If you're interested in that type of relationship we can definitely do some damage together.
Yes, I totally agree with this. I'm always up for a DMZ in the English Channel.
However, I'm all for an agreement of non-aggression between us two.
Sounds good to me. I'll stay out of your way and you stay out of mine. If things work out for us and we need to collaborate on something, we can do that in the future.

Yes, Tunis — I meant the Mediterranean coast. A non-aggression pact suits me well. Let’s solidify that: I will not threaten your borders if you do not interfere with my expansion into southern territories.

I've talked to Turkey, but the usual pleasantries. No mention of anyone's intentions, just saying "hello."

I can let you know what I hear from Italy though.

Hey Turkey!
I agree with you 100% regarding our friendship. I think that R/T is an underrated alliance because it isn't immediately obvious to everyone. Would you be open to a bounce in the Black Sea in spring? Also, what would you want to do with the balkans? Do you want to do a swap later on to swap one of my southern centres for one of yours?
I should add that I'm keen to juggernaut if you are.
I do agree. I'll pass along anything relevant to you.
Sure, I'd be more than happy with that. And vice versa.
Hey Austria! I'm keen for peace between us and maybe we could even work together. Do you want to bounce in Galicia?
Hi Russia! I'm in for peace. I would prefer to leave Galicia empty, but if that makes you nervous, we can do a bounce.

Hello England!
I'm hoping we can have peace between us. I'd like to take Sweden and maybe I could support you into Denmark later on? What are your thoughts on this?
Great! Have you spoken with Germany? They seem interested in knocking you out quickly
Hi there Germany. As I said, I'd be up for working together, let's see how the first season goes, then decide on how to coordinate.

Oh I'm not worried about the bounce, just wondering if you wanted to do it or not. An empty Galicia is great for me if you want to do that. Have you heard from Italy yet? What do you think about the Balkan Scs?
Thanks, Italy and I are starting to talk, and it seems peaceful. No specifics yet, though.

Oh no! If he plans to fight me, would you be interested in trying to conquer Germany together? I'll support you into Holland and the rest of Germany in return for Belgium and your assistance against him. I just need to make sure he doesn't move into Burgundy.
Of course not. That fleet will do what a Turkish fleet does best: sit around and do nothing.
Great!
Alrighty then.

Hello Italy!
I just wanted to check in and ask you what you're thinking so far. We could be very good allies if you want, especially if we both team up with Austria and get rid of Turkey early on. What do you think?
I'll do the same for you.
Hey there Russia! I'd be more than happy to share information between each other, and then potentially work together later on. What do you think?
Of course. Russia has told me he wants to open south, which I imagine you will take to mean he intends to convoy an army into Sweden. I hope we can coordinate to counter it.
So far Italy seems peaceful, and no word from Turkey. I'd rather have Serbia than Rumania, if possible, but that depends on what you are looking for.

I appreciate your offer of alliance, but I see little benefit in joining forces with you at this stage. My focus is on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean — not the northern front. I have no quarrel with Turkey unless they threaten me directly, and I intend to handle that on my own terms.

Hi Russia! I would love to have peace with you and have split Scandinavia. I would prefer to have Denmark and then take a backseat to you on Berlin. Does that sound alright to you?

Let me know what your thoughts are!

Cheers!
Well, first we need to split the Balkans, as per usual. How about I get Bul and Rum, while you get Ser and Gre?
You bet! That's a great start! I will try and get him to go for Berlin so he will be fighting on two fronts. We should be able to take him quickly.
Okay, fair enough.
Hey France, I'm happy to do that. I don't have any info to share so far other than I'm hoping to take Sweden, but you're the first person I've talked to.
Good. I haven't heard from Italy yet.

I see your position on the Central Front. I have no interest in your affairs unless they interfere with mine. However, if your armies move toward Austria or France, I expect you will not use me as a distraction. My focus is on securing southern Europe.
Let's do it!

Greetings Russia!

I'm hoping that we can work together closely and keep things safe on our shared border.

Thanks for letting me know. The juggernaut is my favorite alliance, and I'm definitely willing to work with you on it.

As for the Black Sea, the bounce seems like the obvious move for both of us. And as for the Balkans, the standard split seems good to me. Rum and Bud for you, Bul and Ser for me. We can work on switching them out later on if necessary, but for now we can just keep bouncing.
Nice. I'll move to Burgundy then and I'll support you into Holland.
Hey Italy! Just wanted to reach out and wish you luck. If I hear anything regarding your country I will definitely let you know!
I notice your fleet dominates the North Sea, but the Mediterranean is mine to control. We may not cross paths directly, but I expect your neutrality as I secure southern territories.
Sounds good to me. I'll try and persuade Austria to open to Gal.
That is entirely reasonable.
That sounds like a pretty good split to me. Any plans on dealing with Italy?
Alright, I've only got one piece of info, Germany is looking for allies and trying to 'knock me out quickly'.
Sounds good to me!
Hi Turkey, do you have any plans so far? Germany seems to be focusing on me early on.
Hi Austria! Hope you have a good game. Do you know anything about Germany's intentions?
Hi France! Germany seems to be friendly to me, but we didn't talk about anything specific yet. What are your thoughts?
Thanks for the info!
Are you considering a move to Tyrolia?

Hey Germany!

Sorry for the delay. I don't want to commit on France to quickly but I will be in position next year to help.
I'm sorry I can't be of more assistance. Germany has been largely uncommunicative with me, though England has told me that Germany has said he is planning on opening to Burgundy.
Great!
Hey Germany! I'd like that as well. I'm not planning on moving west at all this game.
Hey Austria! Just wanted to reach out and wish you luck! If I hear anything regarding your country I will definitely let you know!

I am considering expansion into the Mediterranean, not Tyrolia. My fleet will assert control over southern waters, but I do not intend to provoke conflict unless necessary. If your forces remain neutral toward me, we may avoid unnecessary confrontation.
I was hoping to take Rumania, especially if you and Italy are friendly. What do you think?
I can't make any plans to attack him right now, but if the opportunity presents itself, I wouldn't be against helping you out.
And if you're not going for Serbia I'd like to take it, if that's ok.
Of course!
Very well. Good luck to you in the west.
That should work, I'm happy to leave Rumania open to you.
Okay. That's reasonable.
I'm not trying to antagonize you by moving to Bur. I just can't risk you getting in there.
Sounds like a plan. We should be able to take him out quickly
Hmm, how about we make a deal? If you move to Ruhr, I'll stay out of Burgundy as well. And then I'll take Belgium.
Thanks England! I wish you the same!
I told him if he moves to Ruhr I'll let him have Burgundy, we'll see if he takes that bait.
Have you spoken with Germany or France?
Awesome. Have you heard from Turkey?
Are you planning on moving north at all?
Got it, thanks!
Hmm, interesting. I'll see what I can do.
We had a friendly exchange, but it seems that he wants to try and invade me. How about you?
How are your relations with Russia? Has he made any suggestions about Galicia?
No problem, would you be interested in attacking him with me?
BTW, have you heard anything from Germany?
Not yet, no.
Good luck!
We will see! I will try and get more information
Thank you! And you!
He wants a bounce, so not too bad.
Awesome, thanks!
Yeah, we're in contact but we aren't planning anything.
Have you spoken with Germany or Italy?
No problem!
Ok. What's Italy planning?
Has he suggested anything to you about where Warsaw is going?
Not yet, we haven't really touched base. If he attacks either of us, we should help each other, right?
Okay, then neither am I.
Well yes.
Not really, he just wanted a bounce in Galicia.
Would you be interested in working together against England?
He's told me he wants to open south. Has he told you the same?

Your neutrality is noted, and I appreciate your well-wishes. I will be focused on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean — our paths likely will not cross. I expect continued non-interference from you.
If you're going to attack him, you should probably tell me. If you want to make it look like you are attacking him, I can help you.
Yeah, but I'm not too worried, it'll probably be easy to make it seem like we are fighting to our benefit.
Sounds good to me!
Hmm. I'll consider it.
Still nothing from Italy, but we haven't been in touch yet. How about you and Turkey?
Sounds good! Just let me know, because I'll also try to get Russia in on it.
Very possibly, depending on how the board shakes out. We'll see what kind of a fight he gets into with France.
I'm not sure about Turkey. We've been friendly, but there's nothing concrete.
Anything I can do to help?
Exactly.
I remain open to coordination along the Western Front. If your forces advance into Burgundy or Lyon, I can provide support along the Italian coast. Let me know if you wish to proceed.
Not at the moment, but thanks!
Cool, keep me posted!
I will. I'm trying to get a read on England's intentions as well.
Ok. How are things with you and Russia? Are you going to try for the Black Sea?
Right now I'm fine, but thanks.
No worries, let me know.
Nice, thanks!
What are your thoughts on Russia?
I'll be going to Galicia.
That's the plan.
I think he will be going for it as well, so hopefully it'll be a bounce.
Sounds good to me.
Okay, and we are bouncing, right?
Otherwise my unit is just going to hold.
Sounds good, will do.
Perfect!
Great, I'll change up my orders.
We'll see. I hope he does, since it means he won't have an army in Ukr or Gal.
I'm trying to encourage him to move on England.
You can trust me to be on your side here. Austria almost always dies if Russia attacks him, so I would rather you stayed alive.
Perfect, thanks.
Thanks, I'll do the same.

FRANCE: A MAR S A PAR - BUR

messages.message: That was a pretty aggressive opening towards me. What happened?
The thing is that I wanted to keep Sev free to get a second fleet. I'll be going into Rumania this turn.
It looks like he might be more interested in moving on you though.
Yeah, I'm trying to figure it out.
Okay, I moved to Ruhr like you asked.
You'll be letting him have Sweden, right?
Sorry, but I was afraid of you attacking Burgundy.
I will not be bouncing him.
How are you planning on dealing with Italy?
As long as you don't move into Munich.
Hey England, what's the deal with the army to Edi? I was hoping we could keep Scandinavia empty, but that looks pretty aggressive towards me.
Have you spoken to England much? Also, what's your take on England?
Thanks, it'll be good for the balance of power.
No problem. Looks like you have things under control with Italy.
Interesting. Why did you move into Tyrolia? I'd be careful if I were you; Austria seems to have it out for you.
I hope I can get him out. I think I'll have to pull back from Greece, though.
I am going to convoy to Belgium and send my fleet to Norway. I am sorry for not letting you know ahead of time. I will be sending my army south as soon as possible.
Of course not.
Okay cool, just making sure.
Hmm, I hope your fleet isn't there to move against me...
I've only got one army, it doesn't make sense for me to attempt to move there.
England and I are going to work together on France.
I hope so.
No problem! I will definitely let you know ahead of time if it needs to be there.
How do you think we should respond?
Sounds good to me.
And I wouldn't be able to defend against an attack.
Thanks England!
Have you heard from Italy?
But ok.
Okay, cool.
Alright, I'm gonna support you into Holland this turn. Which unit is gonna move there?

I intend to move Army TUS to PIE this Fall. I expect your support in securing the advance as agreed in Spring. My fleet remains in NAP, not to threaten you, but to protect our mutual flank. Let’s ensure our coordination is clear so neither of us is left exposed.
Nothing more than the first message, which was basically "peace?"
Yeah, the same.
I haven't heard much from Italy. Russia has been chatty. We have nothing concrete though.
Sounds good.
Okay, I won't go to the Black Sea this turn. Are we bouncing again or are you going to Con?
So, what's the plan going forward?
I'll move Burgundy to Belgium and then see what happens.
Same, Italy has barely spoken to me. Russia has been quiet.

I moved into Tyrolia? That is incorrect—I have no army in Tyrolia, nor any interest in it. Austria and I remain focused on our own territories. If you seek to provoke, know that I will not be distracted from my goals. My alliance is with Austria, not you.
The army in Yorkshire. Thanks!
Do you know if he is planning on moving on me? I am worried about the army in Tyrolia.
I'll support Galicia into Rumania. I'm not sure if it'll work, though. What do you think?
Okay.
Do you have any idea if Italy is planning on attacking me?

I understand that, but your intentions will be more clear after this turn when you move. As it is, you're pretty out of position to do anything this year except for taking Tunis, which you'll do no matter what I do.
Hmm, are you gonna move into Holland, or stay in Kiel?
I don't know, but I wouldn't leave yourself open to him.
Any chance you'd be willing to move against Italy?
Ah, it's the Autumn, you could try for the north sea, if he moves to Belgium, you'll bounce him out.
Yeah, I won't.
Hmm, I'll need at least another season to prepare, but I'm very open to the idea.
Great, thanks!
Alright so France is looking pretty weak now. How do you want to handle this year?
Let me know if you've got any suggestions for the meantime.
Are we still bouncing in Galicia?
Holland. I don't want to provoke Russia this early.
I'm moving to Con. I'm going to get as many fleets into the Med as possible, and Italy is very clearly moving west, so I should have an advantage there.
That might be the best bet, but it's risky because if he attacks Galicia, that won't work.
If you want to, but it sounds like you may have other plans with the army in Warsaw.

Hey Germany!

France is definitely in trouble. I was wondering if I could take Belgium this year. I will be moving in from Yorkshire. Does that work for you?
Sure, I have no problem with that.
Sounds good.
What are you planning to do with the army in Bulgaria?

I have convinced Germany to let me have Holland.

Russia is going to bounce Germany out of Sweden and we will then crush him quickly.

I am worried about a juggernaut. We will need Italy to get Austria and Turkey to fight. Do you think you could try and convince Austria and Turkey to work together?
My Army TUS will move to PIE this Fall. I expect your Army MAR to support the advance as agreed. Coordination is essential—no ambiguity. If this is not your intent, say so now.
Thanks!
I can try, but he's not been very communicative so far.
Do you mind if I take it in 1902?
I could potentially move into Germany if you want to join me.
Cool, thanks
I don't think it's in my interest to do that this turn.
Hmm, okay, I'll see what I can do.

I am not in Tyrolia and will not be. My focus remains on securing supply centers along the Italian coast. Do not assume I will be a distraction for Germany. My alliance is with Austria, and I will act accordingly.
I understand.
Makes sense.
Italy has responded to me once saying that he wasn't interested in any of my borders.
Are we bouncing again in Galicia?
What do you mean that Russia is going to bounce him out of Sweden?
I have a suggestion if you want to hear it.
Exactly. We want to be as subtle as possible and this is what he thinks is going to happen.
Alright then, I will.
I'm just saying don't leave yourself exposed. If you move to Pie this turn you'll be in a good position to take Marseilles next year.
Hi Turkey, have you heard anything from Italy? I don't know if he's going for me or Austria, but I have reason to believe it's me.
I'd rather do something else with Vienna this turn, but let me know if you'd like to bounce again.
I'm hoping to gain some territory and have a bit more strength.
Sure, I'm always up to hear a good suggestion.
Good to know. I think France will be joining us against Italy in the near future.
Okay, great!
Yeah, that would be good for all of us.
Actually, I'll bounce. I forgot about it!
He has told me that he wants to move west, but I don't know what he plans on doing in particular.
Ok thanks.
It looks like Turkey is friendly with Russia, but he's being played by someone new it looks like.
Yeah, the fleet in the Black Sea makes it look like he is trying to attack Russia, but I'm not sure yet.
Would you be willing to support me into Belgium?
Sounds like a plan!
Are you convoying to Tunis?
Hmm, thanks for the info. Let's see what happens.
Agreed. I'm getting some help with England, so I'm hoping that can help keep Russia under control.
Hmm, but then I won't get Belgium, as England will try and take it as well...
I can bounce if you want me to, but there's a possibility that I'll bounce with Germany.
I can help you take Holland next turn.
Good to know. England hasn't been very talkative with me.
You're probably right.
You should probably bounce Russia in Sweden, that's what I would do.
Have you talked with Russia recently?
Maybe you should move the army to Silesia instead?
If we go for Russia together how would you like to split things up?
Yeah, I was planning on it.
Do you have any suggestions?
Good luck
Yeah, I can do that.
I'd like to get England out of the way, and I'm not sure he's very happy with me over Belgium.
Yes, he wants me to move to the Black Sea, so he will be bouncing me there.
Great, thanks.
I will move Army TUS to PIE with support from Army VEN and France’s Army MAR. I expect coordination from your Army TRI to avoid conflict and maintain pressure on Turkey. Let’s signal unity.
By the way, I'm hearing some interesting things from England, and I think you might want to be careful.
Are you convoying to Norway?
Understood. Army MAR will support Army TUS’s move to PIE as agreed. I expect you to honor our coordination to avoid exposing either of us. If your plans shift, inform me immediately.
Just a little with Germany. Italy hasn't been very communicative.
Can you confirm that you're bouncing?
BTW, he said that Germany is going to bounce you out of Sweden.
Sure thing.

You suggest I move to PIE to prepare for Marseilles—note that I will secure PIE, but my focus remains on Italy’s expansion, not France’s borders. I will not be a pawn for Germany or a distraction for you.
I figured as much. Thanks for the heads up.
No problem.
Sounds good, I am moving the army in Trieste to Budapest.
I'm bouncing, I just woke up.
No, I am not convoying to Tunis. My fleet remains in NAP to secure southern Italy and protect against any aggression. My focus is on the Italian coast, not North Africa.
How are things on your side of the map?
You can have Warsaw and Moscow. I will take Sweden, St. Pete and Sevastopol.

Confirmed—my Army TUS will move to PIE with support from Army VEN and France’s Army MAR. Your Army TRI’s movement to BUD is noted. Let’s maintain coordination to ensure Turkey understands we act as one. No further ambiguity from either side.
Not so good. I'm worried about a Lepanto.
Do you know if Germany is going to bounce me?
That's odd. I haven't gotten any comm from them either
Very well.
Ah, yeah... Russia has told me that Austria might go for him.
Ok.
Okay, I can work with that.

Agreed—Army MAR will support Army TUS’s move to PIE. I expect no interference or hesitation from your side. Let this be clear: our coordination must remain precise. If your plans change, inform me immediately.
What do you mean, a distraction for me?

I mean exactly what I said. I will not be a distraction for you or anyone else. My focus is on securing supply centers along the Italian coast and expanding Italy’s influence. If you seek to divert me from that path, you will find me an unwilling partner.
What's odd?
I don't know, he's not exactly telling me his plans.
So, should I support you to Rum or not?
Understood. I hope you will do the same.
Sweet
Any news on Russia or Germany?
Well, if you convoy to Norway, we can threaten Russia's centers next year.

Our coordination remains clear—I will move Army TUS to PIE with support from Army VEN and France’s Army MAR. I expect your Army TRI to maintain its focus on Turkey’s flank and avoid any unnecessary friction between us. We are stronger together.
Oh ok. Just clarifying.
No worries.
Understood. I will do the same—to secure PIE and maintain our coordinated front. Let us ensure neither of us leaves the other exposed.
I confirm again—Army TUS moves to PIE with support from Army VEN and your coordination is essential. Let’s send Turkey a clear message of unity.

I mean exactly what I said. My focus is on securing supply centers along the Italian coast, not on aiding Germany or being used as a pawn in your schemes. I will not be a distraction for you or anyone else. My alliance is with Austria, and I will act accordingly.
Have you talked with Italy much? Do you know what he plans to do with that army in Tyrolia?
I will be putting a lot of pressure on Russia this year.

I intend to do exactly that—move Army TUS to PIE with your support. Our coordination is not optional; it is essential to securing both our positions. I expect Army MAR to support the advance as agreed.
I have talked with Italy, and I have no idea what he's doing.
I will keep an eye on him.
I reaffirm our coordination—I will move Army TUS to PIE with support from Army VEN and your Army TRI will maintain pressure on Turkey’s flank. Let this be a clear demonstration of our unity.
Okay, thanks.
There is nothing to clarify. I will not be used as a distraction or a pawn. My focus remains on securing Italy’s supply centers and maintaining strength along the southern coast.

I mean exactly what I said. My focus is on securing supply centers along the Italian coast, not on aiding Germany or being used as a pawn in your schemes. I will not be a distraction for you or anyone else. My alliance is with Austria, and I will act accordingly.

I intend to do exactly that—move Army TUS to PIE with your support. Our coordination is not optional; it is essential to securing both our positions. I expect Army MAR to support the advance as agreed.
Alright. I will be bouncing him out of Rum.
What's the plan for this turn?
You got it!
What are your thoughts on Italy? Do you think he's going after Germany or Austria?
Do you know what Russia's doing with that army in Silesia?
I haven't heard much from him. I will see what I can get from him though
There is nothing to clarify. I will not be used as a distraction or a pawn. My focus remains on securing Italy’s supply centers and maintaining strength along the southern coast.

Russia’s movements in Silesia concern me little—I remain focused on securing supply centers along the Italian coast. I suggest you direct your concerns toward your northern frontier, while I maintain my own. My fleet remains in NAP, not to threaten you, but to protect southern Italy.
Hey Italy! Just wanted to check in and see how things are going?
What about your army in Tyrolia? Will you be attacking Germany, or moving against Austria?

I have no army in Tyrolia and no interest in it. My focus remains on securing supply centers along the Italian coast. I suggest you direct your attention to your own flank and the movements of Russia. My fleet remains in NAP to protect southern Italy, not to threaten you.

Italy is proceeding as planned—Army TUS will move to PIE this Fall with support from Army VEN and France’s Army MAR. My focus is on securing Italy’s supply centers and maintaining strength along the southern coast. I remain neutral toward England and welcome a peaceful coexistence.
I know, but are you moving it to Vienna or Trieste?
I'm very curious what you're planning to do with your army in Tyrolia.

Thank you for the information. France should be moving to Marseilles in hopes to bounce Germany out of Burgundy. If you would like I could pass this information on so you have the upper hand against France.

I am not moving to Vienna or Trieste—I have no army in Tyrolia, nor any designs on Austria’s territory. My focus remains on securing supply centers along the Italian coast. My Army TUS will move to PIE this Fall. I suggest you focus on your own flank and the Russian advance rather than speculating about mine.

I have no army in Tyrolia and no intention of moving into it. My focus is on securing supply centers along the Italian coast and maintaining strength with Austria at my back. Do not assume I will be a distraction for your ambitions. My alliance is with Austria, and I will act accordingly.

France’s movements are coordinated with mine—I expect Army MAR to support Army TUS’s move to PIE this Fall. I appreciate your observation, but I will manage my own relations with France. I remain neutral toward England and welcome peaceful coexistence.
No problem! Just wanted to give you a heads up!
Okay. Thank you for the clarification. I will not be bouncing Russia out of Sweden, but I do intend to grab Holland.

You are welcome to Holland, but do not assume Italy will be a passive observer if your expansion threatens Austria or France. My focus remains on securing Italy’s supply centers, but I will not allow Central Europe to be destabilized without consequence.
You want support into Belgium this turn?
I just want to know if you're moving to Vienna or Trieste because it changes my plans.
Are you there?
Army MAR’s support for Army TUS’s move to PIE is essential. I expect no hesitation or ambiguity in your coordination. If your plans change, inform me immediately—there is no room for uncertainty.

Our coordination is clear—I will move Army TUS to PIE with support from Army VEN and your Army TRI will maintain pressure on Turkey’s flank. Let this be a unified demonstration of our strength and unity.
Not this turn, I need to use my fleet to take Norway

AUSTRIA: A SER S A UKR - RUM
ENGLAND: F ENG C A WAL - BEL
ITALY: A VEN S A TUS - PIE
RUSSIA: F SEV S A UKR - RUM

messages.message: Sorry Germany, you were right. We need to take France now while he is weak

I have no immediate plans to move toward Vienna or Trieste. My focus remains on securing supply centers along the southern coast and consolidating strength with Austria. You may proceed with your own plans in the Balkans without concern from me.

I propose coordination on Marseilles this adjustment phase. If you hold back your forces from MAR, I will claim it openly as Italy’s next supply center. In return, I will support your western flank against Germany and continue to pressure Turkey via Austria’s alliance. This is a clear, mutual benefit—let me know if you accept.
Yeah, we need to grab what we can.
If we're going to work together, I need you to communicate.
Do you have any idea what's going on with Italy?
Alright, what's the plan?
None at all. I don't think he's attacking Austria, though.
Alright, so what's the plan?
No, me neither.
I accept, as long as you use that build to attack Austria and not me.
Hi, I might be able to attack Italy next turn, if I build a fleet in Marseilles.
Well you didn't get a build, but I'm not sure where you want to go next.
Have you talked with Austria? What is he doing?
Hmm... Let's see what England builds.
Hmm, Russia attacked you. Any idea what the plan is?
I'm not sure. Let me talk to England and see what's going on.
Also, how come you didn't move to Holland?
Nice.
Sounds good, thanks!
I'm guessing fleet London.
You think so?
What do you think Austria is doing?
Are you interested in helping me?
As agreed, I will hold PIE and VEN secure for our shared strategy. I suggest we coordinate further pressure on BUL and CON in Spring 1902. Let me know if you have movement plans I should align with.
Hi, Russia, would you be interested in coordinating against England?
He'll need it for Norway.
Your push toward Holland concerns me. If you intend to expand further west, be prepared for resistance from France and Italy. Do not expect me to tolerate German dominance in the Low Countries.
Probably working with Russia.
